text.title: rag-eval-production-monitoring Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for rag-eval-production-monitoring application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.
text.decision-tree:
Is per-query lightweight monitoring + scheduled batch eval enough for this surface?
Wire lightweight per-query log + daily LLM-judge sample.
<branch when="traffic_per_day < 50"> Skip; rely on scheduled offline batch eval only.
Raise window size or recalibrate thresholds.
1k queries/day with thumbs UI → lightweight log + daily judge sample.
